title: Moderation Update: High-Severity Report Resolution
body: Recent high-severity abuse reports have been resolved: 1. spam_wave_42 banned for mass phishing link spam across 6 channels. 2. toxic_runner banned for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers. 3. False positive report against core_maintainer closed, as it was determined to be a brigading attempt. The moderation team remains committed to keeping our community safe and inclusive.
